LanguageData.VVE_ArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken self propelled artillery. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into an Udar.
LanguageData.VVE_ArtilleryWreck.label: artillery wreck
LanguageData.VVE_BattleTankWreck.description: An ancient, broken battle tank. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Marshal.
LanguageData.VVE_BattleTankWreck.label: battle tank wreck
LanguageData.VVE_CargoHelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, crashed cargo helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Cherokee.
LanguageData.VVE_CargoHelicopterWreck.label: cargo helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VVE_ClassicCarWreck.description: An ancient, broken classic car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Springbok.
LanguageData.VVE_ClassicCarWreck.label: classical car wreck
LanguageData.VVE_HelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, broken helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Louie.
LanguageData.VVE_HelicopterWreck.label: helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VVE_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.descrip: An ancient, broken infantry fighting vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Badger.
LanguageData.VVE_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.label: infantry fighting vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VVE_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.description: An ancient, broken light armored vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Paladin.
LanguageData.VVE_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.label: light armored vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VVE_OffroadJeepWreck.description: An ancient, broken offroad jeep. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Nomad.
LanguageData.VVE_OffroadJeepWreck.label: offroad jeep wreck
LanguageData.VVE_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken refrigerated truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Hermano.
LanguageData.VVE_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.label: refrigerated truck wreck
LanguageData.VVE_RocketArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken rocket artillery truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Burya.
LanguageData.VVE_RocketArtilleryWreck.label: rocket artillery wreck
LanguageData.VVE_SiegePodWreck.description: An ancient, destroyed siege pod. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Goliath.
LanguageData.VVE_SiegePodWreck.label: siege pod wreck
LanguageData.VVE_SupercarWreck.description: An ancient, broken supercar. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Lightning.
LanguageData.VVE_SupercarWreck.label: supercar wreck
LanguageData.VVE_TruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago. Given enough resources, it can be restored into a Big Rig.
LanguageData.VVE_TruckWreck.label: truck wreck
